goals.plan:
Coaching new drivers and, hopefully, terminating a low performer (braxton). 
Was trending SG, had bad week of callouts, and both of my new drivers got a cell phone ping. Brought Q2 average down to 8.0
Not bringing on Blake Jones (PT), still 13.6. Gonna look for a one more guy.
On track for July, hit over 100% for May/June
Only Brandon C player, terminating Braxton. New Handbook will help.
